---
title: "Toggling Between Traditional and Chat-Based Data Filters in Shiny"
author: Alex Zajichek
date: "2026-05-07"
---

Presented at the [R/Medicine 2026](https://rconsortium.github.io/RMedicine_website/) conference.

```{=html}
<center>
<h3>Slides</h3>
<iframe width = 100% height = 475px class="slide-deck" src="slides.html"></iframe>
</center>
```

[Full screen slideshow](slides.html)

### Conference Presentation

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/fcTKGXL7tNM >}}
